title: Grilled Pork Nem Skewers with Vegetables
description: Inspired by Japanese flavors, this dish features grilled pork nem skewers served with a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: Thread pork nem and vegetables onto skewers, leaving small gaps between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sugar, and 1 tablespoon vegetable oil.
Brush the skewers with the soy sauce mixture and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and brush with the remaining 1 tablespoon vegetable oil.
Garnish with vietnamese basil leaves and serve immediately.
